description: Warden-archetype mid-battle taunts. Voice: procedural, form-bound, literal. Speaker is resolved from the active boss at display time (e.g., Warden of the Assembly Core, Warden of the Mainspring). cowir-battle triggers these when boss HP crosses each threshold, descending.

taunts.text: You are making entries outside the designated fields. I will note this. The notation is itself a field.
The variance form has fourteen sections. You have triggered sections one through seven. Please remain still for section eight.
We are in the final section. The final section is always combat. This was disclosed on the first page.
Sign here. Complete the box marked 'outcome'. Do not leave it blank. The form is not valid without an outcome.
